case_title: SERGIO DE PAZ VS. NETSANET ABRANA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-08-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-08-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF SERGIO DE PAZ IS PRESENT. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
